remaining_tasks.name: Run plan-checker on 7 existing redesigned plans

decisions.decision: Full code revert of prior 87.1 implementation (commit 9f27c7b)
decisions.rationale: Prior implementation had CR-01 personnel picker bug + design mismatch with redesigned vision; scrapped entirely

decisions.decision: Home page gains Overview | Engagements | Proposals sub-tabs; Proposals top-nav tab retired
decisions.rationale: Redesign: proposals move into home sub-tabs, no longer a standalone nav destination

decisions.decision: proposals.js becomes a pure module; proposal modal extracted to app/proposal-modal.js
decisions.rationale: Allows modal to be shared from home.js, project-detail.js, service-detail.js without duplication

decisions.decision: CR-01 anti-pattern: personnel pill window functions MUST use suffixed names
decisions.rationale: renderProposalPillsFor generates HTML calling proposalSelectPersonnelIn / proposalRemovePersonnelFrom (suffixed). Using unsuffixed names breaks the picker silently.

next_action: Run /gsd-plan-phase 87.1 and choose 'Verify existing plans' to spawn plan-checker on the 7 redesigned PLAN.md files (87.1-01 through 87.1-07)
context_notes: FULL RESET: prior 87.1 implementation was reverted. Context redesigned 2026-05-20. 7 new PLAN.md files created matching redesigned context (all committed in 46df5ba). No code exists yet for this phase. Planning session started 2026-05-20 but paused before plan-checker was spawned — no files modified in paused session.
